judgment.summary: Fast-growing software company with strong revenue and FCF, but currently unprofitable on a GAAP basis with high leverage.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 31.0%; next earnings date 2026-04-30.
positives: Revenue growth 31.7% YoY — strong top-line expansion.
Analyst growth est, current FY 49.6% — significant future growth expected.
Free cash flow (TTM) $1.44B — robust cash generation.
Forward P/E 13.26x — attractive valuation given growth prospects.
negatives: Operating margin -2.0% and Profit margin -3.5% — currently GAAP unprofitable.
Return on equity -19.3% and Return on assets -1.9% — negative returns on capital.
Current ratio 0.70 and Quick ratio 0.61 — liquidity concerns.

news.paragraph: Atlassian (TEAM) has no recent headlines, leaving the stock's direction solely to its fundamentals and upcoming earnings. The company is expected to report its next earnings on April 30th, with analysts projecting significant growth. Traders should monitor any pre-earnings sentiment shifts or news that may emerge before the print.
